deep_dive: descriptor publish + first/last TLP header-snapshot queue (reflects v3 §9.3/§9.5, §14)

contracts.claim: first_hdr written only by the SOM packet
last_hdr equals the most recent accepted packet
published descriptor carries the right first/last/len
descriptor queue never overflows (full EOM -> drop)

lesson: A TB timing bug (reading registered outputs right after @(posedge), before the NBA latch settled) made the correct design appear to fail in sim; a #1 after the edge fixed it. Verification-bug, not RTL-bug.
caveats: Single context, 8-bit header proxy, DEPTH-2 descriptor queue.
